zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher de Lister於1434年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本時，他的父親Laurence Lister24歲，母親Ellen Bannister24歲。他於大約1459年與Joan Calverley在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾華拉利享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher de Lister于1434年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本时，他的父亲Laurence Lister24岁，母亲Ellen Bannister24岁。他于大约1459年与Joan Calverley在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年在英国英格兰藍卡爾華拉利享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lister
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Lester
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Lyster
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Ljøsta in Romsdal, probably derived from Old Norse ljóstr ‘fishing spear, leister’.
Danish: nickname originally from Bornholm, derived from a word for a fishing tackle for catching eel.

variants.name: Lidster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

variants.name: Litster
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer, Middle Englishlitster (see Lister ).

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher de Lister was born in 1434, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Laurence Lister, was 24 and his mother, Ellen Bannister, was 24. He married Joan Calverley about 1459, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1467, in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher de Lister est né en 1434, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Laurence Lister, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ellen Bannister, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Calverley environ 1459, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1467, à Whalley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christopher de Lister 1434 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Laurence Lister 24 und seine Mutter Ellen Bannister 24. Er hat um 1459 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Calverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1467 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Whalley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher de Lister è nato il nel 1434 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Laurence Lister, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Bannister, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Calverley circa 1459, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1467, nel Whalley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher de Listerが1434年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父Laurence Listerは24歳，母Ellen Bannisterは24歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでJoan Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウアリーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher de Lister(이)가 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Laurence Lister(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Bannister(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 Joan Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 화알리에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christopher de Lister nasceu em 1434, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Laurence Lister, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Bannister, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Calverley aproximadamente 1459, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1467, em Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher de Lister родился в 1434 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Laurence Lister было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Bannister, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Calverley около 1459 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1467 г. в местности уолли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christopher de Lister nació en 1434, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Laurence Lister, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Ellen Bannister, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Calverley aproximadamente 1459, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1467, en Whalley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
